message:
Fix saved deploy config validation to catch missing target fields

Switch wizard from validate_for_export to validate_for_deploy so saved
configs with a deploy target but missing required fields (e.g. github_repo,
cloudflare_project) are caught before export begins, re-prompting the user
for target-specific settings instead of failing mid-export.

Add tests for both Github and Cloudflare saved-config repair paths.
Update beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
